properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Keep my eyes for only You, God Keep my ears on Your Word Keep my thought with Your Wisdom Keep my heart loving You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keep my voice praising You, God Keep my hands serving You Keep my mouth speaks with blessing Keep my heart loving You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Keep my heart loving You Faithfully, devoted to You Keep my heart loving You Faithfully, devoted to You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Keep my feet to walk with You, God Keep my joy on Your Works Keep my spirit move on worship Keep my heart loving You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Keep my strength serving You, God Keep my soul pure and true Keep my hope in Your Kingdom Keep my heart loving You.
